title: Queues, Streams, Super Streams, Retention, and Replay · Mastery Check
summary: A production review compares near-miss TypeScript messaging decisions for queues, streams, super streams, retention, and replay and requires the smallest defensible queue-versus-stream workload decision and replay plan with changed-case evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for queue-versus-stream workload decision and replay plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare destructive queue consumption with retained stream offsets, replay, retention, protocol clients, and consumer responsibility.
Define age and byte retention, segment behavior, start offset, consumer progress, replay authorization, and late-reader expectations.
Use super streams to partition throughput by key while accounting for partitions, routing, per-partition order, skew, and consumer coordination.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Queue Stream Semantics · changed case · Quiz Queue Stream Semantics
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz messaging team handles case 3953 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to choose queue, stream, or super stream from replay, backlog, throughput, and order-key evidence; keep reconnection and retry work cancellable under one deadline; then change one routing segment and prove the exact destination set. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Compare destructive queue consumption with retained stream offsets, replay, retention, protocol clients, and consumer responsibility.

Which action demonstrates Queue Stream Semantics without dropping earlier contracts?
